results.title: Life Lesson quote by Bruce Willis: by 'You can't undo the past, but you can certainly not...' - Hollywood icon's powerful advice on embracing growth instead of regret
results.description: Bruce Willis achieved global stardom with iconic action roles and diverse film performances. He also shared a life lesson about learning from past mistakes. His family announced his retirement from acting due to aphasia and dementia diagnoses. They now raise awareness for frontotemporal dementia and support affected individuals. Willis's influential filmography continues to entertain audiences worldwide.
